title: ampelocissus sphaerophylla
intro: Ampelocissus sphaerophylla is a climbing plant species in the grape family (Vitaceae) native to India and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ampelocissus sphaerophylla include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting digestive health and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used in various forms, such as capsules, powders, or topical creams, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
